name: PBF Energy Inc.
summary: Overview and Corporate Structure We are one of the largest independent petroleum refiners and suppliers of unbranded transportation fuels, heating oil, petrochemical feedstocks, lubricants and other petroleum products in the United States. We sell our products throughout the Northeast, Midwest, Gulf Coast and West Coast of the United States, as well as in other regions of the UnitedStates, Canada and Mexico and are able to ship products to other international destinations.
